title: Better Mob Drop(No Advancements Version)
description: [Better Mob Drop without advancements]A Minecraft mod/data pack which provide more reasonable mob drop
body:
# 简体中文
（除特殊需要外，建议下载[标准版本](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better_mob_drop)）

最新版本的Minecraft中，Mojang为了所谓保护生物，很多生物都没有对应的掉落物，而这个数据包/模组就是为了解决这个问题的！

现在，各类生物都会直接掉落他们该掉落的！

# Github
[https://github.com/whwdzg/better_mob_drop](https://github.com/whwdzg/better_mob_drop)

# MCMOD
[https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17769.html](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17769.html)

# 官网
[https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-mob-drop.html](https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-mob-drop.html)

# Q&A
1. 这个数据包/模组对我的MC有什么更改？
   更好的生物掉落模组/数据包加载后，对应生物都可以合理地掉落对应物品！
2. 那有哪些生物掉落被更改了?
   你可以在游戏中查看进度树，每种生物被击杀时都会点亮对应进度（仅支持简体中文和英语）或官网（仅中文）

# English
（Except you really dislike advancements, you should install [standard version](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better_mob_drop)）

In the newest Minecraft, lots of mobs drops nothing! This doesn't make sense at all! This data pack/mod is made to solve this.

Now goat will drop horns and mutton, and other creaturs now drops the items they should be.

# Github
[https://github.com/whwdzg/better_mob_drop](https://github.com/whwdzg/better_mob_drop)

# MCMOD
[https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17769.html](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17769.html)

# 官网
[https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-mob-drop.html](https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-mob-drop.html)

# Q&A
1. What does this mod do to my Minecraft?
   Better Mob Drop change the item dropped from some mobs to make it more reasonable.
2. How many mobs have been changed?
   You can check out the advancements(only Chinese & English) & Official page(only Chinese)
